creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Just an update. Still no luck :

http://box.martymac.org/FreeBSD-Packages/data/FBSD130amd64-default/2021-06-15_12h07m41s/logs/errors/openvdb-8.1.0_1.log

and :
